title: BEM-730 watchdog evidence
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 13:48 (UTC+3)'

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {}
watch=load('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
checks=watch.get('checks',[]) if isinstance(watch.get('checks',[]),list) else []
recent=checks[-15:]
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem728' in low or 'bem-728' in low or 'bem725' in low or 'bem-725' in low or 'why no previous response' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision})
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml')
wf_text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
# Check for runtime evidence file. It is expected only if workflow records start/end state.
trigger_state=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
trigger_proven=bool(trigger_state.get('started_at') or trigger_state.get('completed_at') or responses)
status='watchdog_running_trigger_not_proven' if not trigger_proven else 'watchdog_running_trigger_proven'
blocker=None if trigger_proven else {'code':'CLAUDE_INBOUND_TRIGGER_RUNTIME_NOT_PROVEN','message':'Workflow file exists and BEM-728 push should trigger it, but repo has no runtime state or Claude response proving the workflow actually started/completed.'}
state={'schema_version':'watchdog_and_claude_trigger_evidence.v1','bem':'BEM-730','status':status,'watchdog_check_count':len(checks),'recent_checks':recent,'watchdog_latest_status':watch.get('status'),'watchdog_last_checked_at':watch.get('checked_at'),'responses_found':len(responses),'responses':responses,'claude_inbound_workflow_exists':wf.exists(),'claude_inbound_workflow_has_gpt_to_claude_path':'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/**' in wf_text,'claude_inbound_trigger_runtime_state':trigger_state,'claude_inbound_trigger_proven':trigger_proven,'operator_role':'none','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem730_watchdog_and_claude_trigger_evidence.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem730_watchdog_and_claude_trigger_evidence.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-730 | Watchdog And Claude Trigger Evidence | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Watchdog checks: '+str(len(checks))+sep+'Last checked: '+str(watch.get('checked_at'))+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Claude inbound workflow exists: '+str(wf.exists())+sep+'Runtime trigger proven: '+str(trigger_proven)+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem730_watchdog_and_claude_trigger_evidence','status':status,'watchdog_check_count':len(checks),'watchdog_last_checked_at':watch.get('checked_at'),'responses_found':len(responses),'trigger_proven':trigger_proven,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem730_watchdog_and_claude_trigger_evidence.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-730 '+status+' watchdog_checks='+str(len(checks))+' responses_found='+str(len(responses))+' trigger_proven='+str(trigger_proven)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Measured watchdog tick count, inbound Claude response count, and whether Claude inbound workflow runtime trigger is proven by repo evidence')
"""
No issue comments.
